current_statement: The five-responsibility Decision Object core is the current working interpretation. It is preferred over the earlier five-layer MVP-sufficiency claim because Claim A was challenged by the STANDING-object probe and Claim B was proposed as a narrower revision.
not_allowed_to_say: Amadou's acceptance of Claim A proves Claim A.
One supporting test cancels one challenging test by count.
